generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA director, I can tell you: civil defense readiness isn't about fear, it's about responsibility. We've seen what happens when communities aren't prepared. Basic preparedness measures save lives and reduce strain on first responders. It's not about paranoia—it's about duty. #NationalSecurity #CommunityPreparedness
